creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text: Hmm, looking at your Wireshark dump it seems like your laptop (192.168.1.14) is connecting to all those services, not the other way around. As Kubilay mentions, it all seems to do with preloading and caching stuff (including tabs that you left open from your last session?). So nothing to see here really from a FreeBSD point of view.
